attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  TRANSACTION_DIST_ID     
 ,APPLICATION_NAME        
 ,APPLICATION_ID          
 ,LEDGER_ID               
 ,ORG_ID                  
 ,EVENT_ID                
 ,EVENT_TYPE              
 ,EVENT_STATUS            
 ,AE_HEADER_ID            
 ,AE_LINE_NUM             
 ,TRANSACTION_ID          
 ,TRX_NUMBER              
 ,TRX_LINE_ID             
 ,PARTY_ID                
 ,PARTY_SITE_ID           
 ,PERIOD_YEAR             
 ,PERIOD_NUM              
 ,AMOUNT                  
 ,GL_DATE                 
 ,EXCHANGE_RATE           
 ,EXCHANGE_DATE           
 ,CURRENCY_CODE           
 ,CONVERSION_TYPE         
 ,ACCOUNT_CLASS           
 ,HEADER_ID               
 ,ORDER_NUMBER            
 ,ORDER_LINE_ID           
 ,QUANTITY_INVOICED       
 ,DIST_TYPE               
 ,ELEMENT_TYPE            
 ,SEQUENCE_NUMBER         
 ,CCID                    
 ,SEGMENT1                
 ,SEGMENT2                
 ,SEGMENT3                
 ,SEGMENT4                
 ,SEGMENT5                
 ,SEGMENT6                
 ,SEGMENT7                
 ,SEGMENT8                
 ,SEGMENT9                
 ,SEGMENT10               
 ,DIST_BAL_TYPE           
 ,SOURCE_TABLE_NAME       
 ,JE_CATEGORY_NAME        
 ,JE_SOURCE_NAME          
 ,GL_POSTED_DATE          
 ,SOURCE_BATCH_NAME       
 ,SOURCE_BATCH_ID         
 ,DESTINATION_BATCH_NAME  
 ,DESTINATION_BATCH_ID    
 ,ERROR_MESSAGE           
 ,ERROR_FLAG              
 ,ERROR_CODE              
 ,CREATION_DATE           
 ,CREATED_BY              
 ,LAST_UPDATE_DATE        
 ,LAST_UPDATED_BY         
 ,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN       
 ,REQUEST_ID              
 ,PROG_APPL_ID            
 ,PROG_ID                 
 ,PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE     
 ,ATTRIBUTE1              
 ,ATTRIBUTE2              
 ,ATTRIBUTE3              
 ,ATTRIBUTE4              
 ,ATTRIBUTE5              
 ,ATTRIBUTE6              
 ,ATTRIBUTE7              
 ,ATTRIBUTE8              
 ,ATTRIBUTE9              
 ,ATTRIBUTE10             
 ,ATTRIBUTE11             
 ,ATTRIBUTE12             
 ,ATTRIBUTE13             
 ,ATTRIBUTE14             
 ,ATTRIBUTE15             
 ,ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT        
 ,PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID       
 ,ATTRIBUTE16             
 ,ATTRIBUTE17             
 ,ATTRIBUTE18             
 ,ATTRIBUTE19             
 ,ATTRIBUTE20             
 ,ATTRIBUTE21             
 ,ATTRIBUTE22             
 ,ATTRIBUTE23             
 ,ATTRIBUTE24             
 ,ATTRIBUTE25             
 ,ATTRIBUTE26             
 ,ATTRIBUTE27             
 ,ATTRIBUTE28             
 ,ATTRIBUTE29             
 ,ATTRIBUTE30             
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE31        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE32        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE33        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE34        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE35        
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE36         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE37         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE38         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE39         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE40         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE41         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE42         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE43         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE44         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE45         
 ,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE  
 FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_V    DIST 
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_XLA_NRS_OA_INCR WI
        WHERE DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID=WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT)

SELECT 
 1 AE_HEADER_ID, 
 2 AE_LINE_NUM,
 DIST.APPLICATION_ID,
COALESCE (DIST.GL_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS ACCOUNTING_DATE,
COALESCE (DIST.GL_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) ,
DIST.LEDGER_ID, 
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
 DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,
 DIST.ATTRIBUTE3 /*inventory item id */,
 DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
 DIST.ATTRIBUTE2 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
 DIST.ATTRIBUTE7 /*previous customer trx line id */ ,
 DIST.ORDER_LINE_ID AS OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT,/* offer attribution id */
 DIST.CCID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
 DIST.CURRENCY_CODE,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,
 DIST.DIST_TYPE,/* Distribution Type */
 COALESCE(SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,0)  ACCOUNTING_RULE_DUR_CNT,
 COALESCE(SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 COALESCE(SUB_ALL.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')  ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
 COALESCE(SUB_ALL.RULE_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
 SUB_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY,
 CAST(SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DECIMAL(18,8)) AS ATTRIB_PCT, 
  SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
 SUB_ALL.TRX_CLASS,
 EXT_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,/*top sku's customer transaction id */
 COALESCE(EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT , /*customer transaction line id */
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3 as DEAL_ID, /* deal id */
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, /* subscription_code */
 CASE WHEN SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTION_CODE IN ('ATTRIBUTED MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU') THEN 'BIB'
    WHEN SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTION_CODE  IN ( 'OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU') THEN 'BIB OFFSET'
    ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS ATTRIB_CD , 
  'CG' AS SS_CD,
 DIST.ATTRIBUTE8 as ATTRIBUTE13,
 SUB_ALL.BUNDLE_TYPE, 
  SUB_ALL.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID,
 DIST.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID
 ,DIST.ATTRIBUTE2  
  FROM
        $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_V    DIST 
          INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REVENUE_EXT_SUB_V SUB_ALL
        ON DIST.ATTRIBUTE2 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2   
        INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
        ON SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
UNION ALL
 
SELECT 
   1 AE_HEADER_ID ,
 2 AE_LINE_NUM,
 DIST.APPLICATION_ID,
 COALESCE (DIST.GL_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS ACCOUNTING_DATE,
COALESCE (DIST.GL_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) ,
DIST.LEDGER_ID,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
 DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,
 DIST.ATTRIBUTE3 /*inventory item id */,
 DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
 DIST.ATTRIBUTE2 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
 DIST.ATTRIBUTE7 /*previous customer trx line id */ ,
 DIST.ORDER_LINE_ID AS OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT,/* offer attribution id */
 DIST.CCID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
 DIST.CURRENCY_CODE,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,
 DIST.DIST_TYPE,/* Distribution Type */
 COALESCE(SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,0)  ACCOUNTING_RULE_DUR_CNT,
 COALESCE(SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 COALESCE(SUB_ALL.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')  ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
 COALESCE(SUB_ALL.RULE_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
 SUB_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY,
 CAST(SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DECIMAL(18,8)) AS ATTRIB_PCT, 
  SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
 SUB_ALL.TRX_CLASS,
 EXT_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,/*top sku's customer transaction id */
 COALESCE(EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT , /*customer transaction line id */
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3 as DEAL_ID, /* deal id */
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, /* subscription_code */
 CASE WHEN SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTION_CODE IN ('ATTRIBUTED MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU') THEN 'BIB'
    WHEN SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTION_CODE  IN ( 'OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU') THEN 'BIB OFFSET'
    ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS ATTRIB_CD , 
  'CG' AS SS_CD,
 DIST.ATTRIBUTE8 as ATTRIBUTE13,
 SUB_ALL.BUNDLE_TYPE, 
  SUB_ALL.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID,
 DIST.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID
 ,DIST.ATTRIBUTE2  
FROM
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_V DIST 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REVENUE_EXT_SUB_V SUB_ALL
ON DIST.ATTRIBUTE2 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2   
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
 ON SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
